title: sanguisorba minor subsp. lasiocarpa
intro: Sanguisorba minor subsp. lasiocarpa, also known as dwarf burnet, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The medicinal properties of dwarf burnet have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Dwarf burnet can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
